actionable_items: ### 1. Add one additional frontier proprietary model in Exp1 + Exp9 (execution-blocked)
- **What to change**: Include at least one of GPT-4o / Claude family in the same reporting frame as current models.
- **Why it matters**: Open-weight-heavy mix remains the top likely bias critique (“bias” is #1 rejection weakness in calibration data).
- **Expected impact**: HIGH — strongest direct mitigation of model-selection skepticism.
- **Feasible**: Conditional on API budget/access and rerun time; not completable from text-only edits.
